creator: ddaniel@nvidia.com
text:
Hey, 
this panic reproduced for me with all required params 

sysctl net.inet.tcp.bb.log_auto_mode=4 # sysctl net.inet.tcp.bb.log_auto_all=1 # sysctl net.inet.tcp.bb.log_auto_ratio=1
